plan: In django/db/models/functions/datetime.py, change TruncDate.as_sql (line 295) and TruncTime.as_sql (line 308) to compute tzname via self.get_tzname() from TimezoneMixin instead of unconditionally calling timezone.get_current_timezone_name(), so a tzinfo passed to the constructor is honored. Add regression tests in tests/db_functions/datetime/test_extract_trunc.py covering TruncDate/TruncTime with an explicit tzinfo, and note tzinfo support for these functions in the database-functions docs.
